PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?person ?username ?personLabel(xsd:integer(REPLACE(STR(?count) , "," , "")) AS ?numericCount) WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P2003 ?username .
  ?person p:P8687 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P8687 ?count .
  ?person rdfs:label ?personLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?personLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(datatype(?count) = xsd:string)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?numericCount)
LIMIT 1
